message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
participant "Service A" as ServiceA
participant "Service B" as ServiceB

Client -> ServiceA : GET /service-a/concept/1
ServiceA --> Client : 301 Redirect: /service-b/concept/1
Client -> ServiceB : GET /service-b/concept/1
ServiceB --> Client : 200 OK: <object>
@enduml
